reason: A woman copes with her family’s loss in a surreal, poetic dance of grief.
Angels observe human sorrow, capturing the beauty and strangeness of loss.
A man obsessed with death finds an unlikely connection, blending sadness and humor.
A spirit reaches out to cope with loss, gentle and quietly magical.
An accountant’s haunting visions turn his grief into a dreamlike journey.
A director returns home to mourn a friend, discovering cinema’s ghostly beauty.
Generations weave loss into daily life in this earthy, almost fable-like tale.
A farmer hears the call of baseball ghosts, finding hope in sorrow’s echo.
A man relives the same day, unveiling the surreal comedy hidden in grief.
A teacher’s heartbreak becomes a lesson in fleeting beauty and sorrow.
